welcome.title: Welcome to Wavedge!
welcome.description: Your crypto intelligence dashboard is ready. Here's how to get started:
heatmap.title: Signal Heatmap
heatmap.tip: Signals = a composite indicator of news volume + social discussion + whale activity. More signals means this token is worth watching.
heatmap.legendSizeTip: Larger cells = higher market cap. The biggest tokens take up the most space.
heatmap.legendNewsTip: Number of news articles in the last 24 hours. Arrows show whether sentiment is bullish or bearish.
heatmap.legendSocialTip: Social media mentions and sentiment from Twitter, Reddit, and Telegram.
heatmap.legendWhaleTip: Large transactions (whale activity) detected on-chain in the last 24 hours.
feed.historicalTooltip: Historical avg 24h price change based on {samples} similar event{plural}
stats.priceTip: The percentage price change in the last 24 hours.
stats.sentimentTip: Market Sentiment: Bullish = people are optimistic, Bearish = people are pessimistic.
stats.marketCapTip: The total value of all circulating coins. Higher means the market is bigger.
chart.selectToken: Select a token to view chart
chart.chartTip: Candlestick chart: each candle represents the open, high, low, close price for a time period. Green = up, Red = down.
chart.clickToLoad: Click a token row to load its price chart
table.marketCapTip: The total value of all circulating coins. Higher means the market is bigger.
table.volumeTip: 24h Volume: the total amount of trading in the past day. Higher means a more active market.
table.noData: No price data yet — updates every 5 minutes
impact.impactTip: Based on historical data, the average price change within 24 hours after similar news was published. (n=sample size)
impact.emptyAction: Add tokens to your watchlist to see related news
impact.emptyAddTokens: Add more tokens to your watchlist
alerts.watchlistDesc: Select tokens you want to receive alerts for.
alerts.channelsDesc: Choose how you want to receive alerts.
alerts.channelPushDesc: Browser push alerts even when tab is closed
alerts.telegramHelp: Send /start to @WavedgeBot to get your chat ID
alerts.sensitivityTip: Higher sensitivity triggers alerts more easily. Medium is recommended for beginners.
alerts.sensitivityDesc: Controls how easily alerts are triggered. Higher sensitivity = more alerts.
alerts.signalRequirementsTip: How many signals must fire simultaneously to trigger an alert. Beginners should choose 2-3 to reduce noise.
alerts.signalRequirementsDesc: How many signals must fire simultaneously to trigger an alert.
alerts.pushNotSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser
alerts.pushNotConfigured: Push notifications not configured on server
alertHistory.noAlerts: No alerts triggered in the last {hours} hours.
alertHistory.explanation: Alerts fire when multiple signals (news, price, volume) breach thresholds simultaneously.
upgrade.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgrade.description: Unlock {feature} and more with Wavedge Pro.
missed.proDesc: Pro users got them all. Free plan: {limit} alerts/day.
stale.delayed: Data may be delayed (last update: {age} ago)
watchlist.signalsTip: The number of news articles and events related to this token in the past 24 hours.
watchlist.emptyTitle: No tokens on your watchlist yet
ad.upgradePro: Upgrade to Pro — no ads, real-time alerts, full history
apiKey.loginRequired: Please log in to manage API keys.
apiKey.proDesc: Generate API keys to access Wavedge data programmatically. Upgrade to Pro to unlock API access.
apiKey.loadFailed: Failed to load API keys. Please try again.
apiKey.copyWarning: Copy this key now — it won't be shown again.
apiKey.noKeys: No active API keys. Create one above.
apiKey.quickStartDesc: Use your API key as a Bearer token. Rate limit: 100 requests/day.
apiKey.revokeConfirm: Revoke this API key? Any applications using it will stop working.
